summary: FINAL VERIFICATION PASS for Perk Orbit. All 18 backend pytest tests PASS (no regressions). Full UI checklist (14 items) PASSES end-to-end on the live preview URL with 0 errors: 4-item BottomNav with new nav-circle, top-level Circle tab has NO back button while keeping nav visible, search Croma→Tata, Ending Soon shows '3 days left', Add Voucher Manual + SMS extract (Myntra/MYNTRA200/200), 3 coupon tabs filter, Asset membership Break-even bar + Log savings, Content membership shows only renewal + ROI-not-applicable text, selective sharing via ShareSheet stores member_id (not name) and tags voucher 'Shared', profile menu navigation (Profile/Membership/Family Circle/Settings/Lock) + topbar-back, Razorpay-mocked ₹99 activation + referral share, global back from Membership returns to Home, Family Cards opens from Circle tab and back returns to Circle (4th tab). Brand audit: 'Reward Circle' has ZERO occurrences across Home, Coupons, Points, Circle, Profile, Settings, Membership, Family Cards.
critical_code_review_comments: App.jsx is ~1088 lines and growing — exceeds the 700-line soft cap; consider splitting screens (HomeScreen, MyCouponsScreen, MyPointsScreen, CirclePage, FamilyCardsPage, MembershipPage, ProfilePage, SettingsPage, AddVoucherSheet, ShareSheet, HowToSheet) into /app/frontend/src/screens/ and /app/frontend/src/sheets/.

Hardware back: window.popstate listener calls pop() but never pushes history state on push(), so the OS/browser back gesture may not reliably traverse the in-memory stack. Consider integrating with history.pushState on each push() and history.back() in pop().
/api/circle/unshare still does not verify family_member_id belongs to user_pin (only ObjectId.is_valid) — low impact because $pull is scoped, but adds defense-in-depth (already noted iter_2).
Index recommendation: add db.vouchers.create_index([('user_pin', 1), ('shared_with', 1)]) and ('user_pin', 1), ('category', 1)) for scale.
Profile menu Lock action resets stack to [{home}] but the Lock screen does not clear any in-flight sheets (addOpen/shareFor/howToFor) — minor UX nit; closing those on lock would be cleaner.
test_credentials: App PIN: 1234. user_pin query param: 1234. PIN keypad testids are key-1..key-9/key-0/key-back.
seed_data_creation: Vouchers (TestBrand, Myntra, Reliance One, Netflix) and Tester circle member created during UI run and cleaned up via DELETE after testing. A mocked Pro membership remains active for user_pin=1234 (no real charge).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression command: `pytest backend/tests/test_perk_orbit.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml` (18/18, ~11s). Frontend selectors confirmed working: PIN keypad uses [data-testid='key-{digit}'] (NOT pin-key-{digit}). BottomNav: nav-home/coupons/points/circle. CirclePage receives onBack=undefined when reached via tab (length-1 stack) — no topbar-back rendered; receives onBack=pop when reached via profile menu (push). FamilyCardsPage is always pushed -> always shows back. ShareSheet target buttons use share-to-{member_id}. Live URL: https://aff82223-f799-4dfa-9e45-79a3768daf54.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: No issues. Verdict: PASS — Perk Orbit ready for sign-off.
